full_text:
AgentMail: Email Inboxes for AI Agents | Y Combinator
Home › Companies › AgentMail
AgentMail
Email Inboxes for AI Agents
Summer 2025
Active
Developer Tools
API
Email
San Francisco
https://agentmail.to
Email Inboxes for AI Agents
AgentMail is the email inbox API for AI agents. It gives agents their own email inboxes, like Gmail does for humans.
Active Founders
Haakam Aujla
Founder
Founder at AgentMail
Prev quant researcher at Optiver
Haakam Aujla

Prev quant researcher at Optiver
Michael Kim

Prev @NVIDIA on Autonomous Vehicles

Prev @NVIDIA on Autonomous Vehicles
Adi Singh
Founder
Founder at AgentMail. Previously invested at Accel, StepStone Group,and Flex Capital. Former operator across accounting, edtech, and e-commerce.
Adi Singh
Founder
Founder at AgentMail. Previously invested at Accel, StepStone Group,and Flex Capital. Former operator across accounting, edtech, and e-commerce.
Latest News
AgentMail raises $6M to build an email service for AI agents | TechCrunch
Mar 10, 2026
Company Launches
AgentMail - The API-first email provider for AI agents
See original launch post
TLDR
AgentMail is the first email provider for AI agents. Use our API to give your agents their own email inboxes.
Why?
We started building email agents because they can live within users’s inboxes in their inboxes and authenticate themselves with third-party applications. But building on top of legacy providers such as Gmail is a struggle. They
Lack API support for creating new inboxes
Charge monthly subscriptions per inbox
Impose restrictive rate and sending limits
Offer poor developer experience
These providers don’t scale with both inbox creation or volumes of emails sent/received that AI agents often face, so we’re rebuilding email infrastructure from scratch to enable this.
Solution
AgentMail is an API-first email provider that gives agents their own inboxes to send, receive, and act upon emails. Think of it like Gmail, but with
Programmatic inbox creation and management
Usage-based pricing scaling with emails sent/received
No restrictive rate/sending limits
Real-time events over webhooks and websockets
Simple API key auth – no OAuth headaches
Built-in API permissions and agent guardrails
Semantic search across every inbox in organization
Automatic labeling with user-defined prompts
Structured data extraction
And more on the way!
Demo
In this demo, we show how easy it is to build an email agent with AgentMail: https://youtu.be/1V7BISeFUTM
In this demo, we show an example of a voice + email agent built with AgentMail: https://youtu.be/eG2fCsRK4RY
Ask
If you are building agents that could use email capabilities, we would love to learn more about your company. You can reach us at founders@agentmail.cc
https://agentmail.to
